subject: Invoice Discrepancy
body: My invoice is wrong, please fix it.
why_tricky: The request is straightforward and specifically asks for a billing issue to be resolved.

subject: Subscription Cancellation
why_tricky: The intent is clear: the customer wants to cancel their subscription.

subject: Invoice Not Received
body: I haven't received my latest invoice. Can you send it to me?

subject: App Crashes on Save
